headlines.headline: Plevik Energy wins industry award for excellence in cloud infrastructure

sentiment.reasoning: Industry awards provide positive brand sentiment but rarely translate into immediate or sustained financial performance shifts.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
